/CAL SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/REVK/X DEFENDANT IS SENTENCE ON CASE NUMBERS #13001841 AND #11030637 AND 	001579/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE #13001841) TO 3 YEARS, UPPER TERM/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE #11030637) TO 8 MONTHS, ONE THIRD MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 (CASE # 9001579) TO 4 MONTHS, ONE THIRD MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE/PGM10:SF STRONG/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER, SIGNED AND FILED/STATES/DEF: SHALL ALSO SERVE THE FOLLOWING ENHANCEMENT TERMS:/X:COUNT 1 (CASE #13001841) ENHANCEMENT PER PC 667,5(B) 1  YEAR, CONSECUTIVE/X:TOTAL  5 YEARS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCEIS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT WAIVED ALL PRIOR CREDITS UP TO 05-14-13 ON CASE NUMBERS #13001841 AND #11030637 AND 	001579/X:AS TO COUNT 1(CASE #11030637)   DEF SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL FOR 8 MONTHS WITH16 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/X:AS TO COUNT 1 (CASE # 9001579)   DEF SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL FOR 4 MONTHS WITH 16 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/MANSUP:4 YEARS/MANSUP1/
